FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In south, cyclonic mainly northeasterly 3 to 5, occasionally 6 in west. In north, northeasterly 3 to 5, backing northerly or northwesterly 4 to 6 later.
Sea state
In south, very rough at first in west, otherwise rough, but becoming moderate later in northeast. in north, very rough at first in southwest, otherwise moderate or rough.
Weather
In south, thundery showers. In north, occasional drizzle, fog patches.
Visibility
In south, good, occasionally poor. In north, moderate or good, occasionally very poor.
